name: Apimeds Pharmaceuticals US, Inc.
summary: PART I We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company in the process of developing Apitox, an intradermally administered bee venom-based toxin. Our focus is primarily on developing innovative therapies that address inflammation and pain management symptoms associated with knee OA and, to a lesser extent, MS. Apitox is currently marketed and sold by Apimeds Inc. (Apimeds Korea) in South Korea as Apitoxin for the treatment of OA. Apimeds US is not associated with the market, sale and revenues g...
